Skip to contents
ipf 0.0.1
  • Get started
  • Reference

Augment data with raked weights

augment.ipf_rake.Rd

Returns the original data frame with a .weight column appended.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'ipf_rake'
augment(x, ...)

Arguments

x

An ipf_rake object.

...

Additional arguments (ignored).

Value

A tibble with all original columns plus .weight.

Examples

data <- data.frame(
  gender = sample(c('M', 'F'), 100, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.6, 0.4))
)
targets <- list(gender = c(M = 0.5, F = 0.5))
result <- rake(data, targets)
augment(result)
#> # A tibble: 100 × 2
#>    gender .weight
#>    <chr>    <dbl>
#>  1 M        0.758
#>  2 F        1.47 
#>  3 F        1.47 
#>  4 M        0.758
#>  5 M        0.758
#>  6 M        0.758
#>  7 M        0.758
#>  8 M        0.758
#>  9 F        1.47 
#> 10 F        1.47 
#> # ℹ 90 more rows
